name: Sauteed Turkey with Citrus Currant Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Cook the turkey fillet slices in batches for about 2 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
3. Sprinkle with half of the salt and pepper.
4. Remove the turkey from the pan and keep warm.
5. Increase the heat to high and add the orange juice, lemon juice, currant jelly, tarragon, and remaining salt and pepper to the skillet.
6. Boil until slightly thickened, about 4 minutes.
7. Stir in any collected juices around the turkey and boil for an additional minute.
8. Remove the pan from heat and stir in the butter.
9. Pour the sauce over the cooked turkey and serve.
